title: Create Hello World Function
titleCn: 创建 Hello World 函数

testcases.input: args = [] Output: "Hello World" Explanation: const f = createHelloWorld(); f(); // "Hello World" The function returned by createHelloWorld should always return "Hello World".
testcases.expectedOutput: "Hello World" Explanation: const f = createHelloWorld(); f(); // "Hello World" The function returned by createHelloWorld should always return "Hello World".

testcases.input: args = [{},null,42] Output: "Hello World" Explanation: const f = createHelloWorld(); f({}, null, 42); // "Hello World" Any arguments could be passed to the function but it should still always return "Hello World".
testcases.expectedOutput: "Hello World" Explanation: const f = createHelloWorld(); f({}, null, 42); // "Hello World" Any arguments could be passed to the function but it should still always return "Hello World".
